install tools for mcps (#348)

This pull request introduces a new GitHub Actions workflow for setting
up the Copilot environment. The workflow is triggered manually and sets
up the necessary tools for the Copilot project.

**New workflow for Copilot setup:**

* Added `.github/workflows/copilot-setup-steps.yml` to define a manual
workflow (`workflow_dispatch`) that installs the `bun` and `uv` tools
using third-party actions.# Summary

---------

commit.message:
Fix skill trigger overlap — setup vs orchestration

federation-setup: triggers on creation intent (go multi-team, I need teams,
federate this project). Explicitly notes: only when no config exists yet.

federation-orchestration: triggers on management intent (launch team,
monitor, send directive, sync skills). Only when config already exists.

Removed vague 'federate' and 'federation' triggers from orchestration
that were catching setup-intent phrases.

Co-authored-by: Vladi Lyga <lyvladi@gmail.com>
Co-authored-by: Copilot <223556219+Copilot@users.noreply.github.com>

fix: update dashboard counts and show success feedback after group dismiss (#73)

* fix: update dashboard counts and show success feedback after group dismiss

- Add onDismissed(count) callback to NotificationList so it can
  propagate dismissals up to DashboardPanel
- Thread callback through RepoHealthRow via onNotifsDismissed prop
- In DashboardPanel.handleNotifsDismissed: decrement notificationCount
  and totalNotifications, strip the 'has-notifications' warning when
  count reaches 0, and recompute reposWithWarnings — so all badges
  (337 Notifications card, per-repo pill, section header) update
  immediately without a full refresh
- Show a transient '✓ N notifications dismissed' success banner
  inside NotificationList that auto-clears after 3 seconds
- Success banner also appears on the 'No notifications' empty state so
  the user sees confirmation even after the last notification clears

  headers (which use white-space: nowrap) cannot force the panel wider
  than the viewport

  actually kicks in when the header is constrained

in the section header. The selected sort is saved to localStorage under
'dashboard-notif-sort' and restored on next load (defaults to count).

commit.message:
fix(service): use replaceView for seamless background/foreground video

Previously, backgrounding the app triggered surfaceDestroyed() which
called stopPreview(), killing Camera2 capture. On return, startPreview()
created a new RtmpCamera2/SrtCamera2 instance, orphaning the old one
with the active connection. Result: frozen video, audio continued.

Now StreamingService uses replaceView during active streams:
- detachPreviewSurface(): calls replaceViewWithBackground() to switch
  to headless mode (camera keeps capturing, encoder stays connected)
- attachPreviewSurface(): calls replaceView(openGlView) to hot-swap
  back to the new surface without interrupting the stream

stopPreview() is still used when no stream is active.

Co-authored-by: Copilot <223556219+Copilot@users.noreply.github.com>

repository.name: StreamCaster-android
repository.description: StreamCaster is a native Android app for live streaming camera and/or microphone to RTMP/RTMPS endpoints.

commit.message:
feat(service): add replaceView methods to EncoderBridge for background streaming

Add replaceViewWithBackground(Context) and replaceView(OpenGlView) to
the EncoderBridge interface, wrapping RootEncoder's Camera2Base.replaceView()
API. This enables seamless background/foreground transitions:

- replaceViewWithBackground(): switches to headless GlStreamInterface,
  camera keeps capturing and encoder stays connected
- replaceView(OpenGlView): hot-swaps back to a visible surface mid-stream

Implemented in RtmpCamera2Bridge, SrtCamera2Bridge, and StubEncoderBridge.

Co-authored-by: Copilot <223556219+Copilot@users.noreply.github.com>

commit.message:
feat: add localization support (en-US + de-DE) (#4)

* feat: add localization support (en-US + de-DE)

- Add .resw resource files for English and German
- Add LocalizationService: reads/saves language override in LocalSettings,
  sets ApplicationLanguages.PrimaryLanguageOverride at startup
- Add LanguageOption model and SettingsViewModel
- Replace all hardcoded XAML strings with x:Uid
- Localize StatusText and GameEventType names in C# code
- Add language picker ComboBox + restart InfoBar to SettingsPage

Co-authored-by: Copilot <223556219+Copilot@users.noreply.github.com>

* fix: address Copilot PR review issues

- LanguageOption: remove hardcoded 'System Default'; display name now
  sourced from LanguageSystemDefault resource via LocalizationService
- LocalizationService: fix unsafe (string) cast in Initialize() with
  safe 'raw is string s' pattern; validate saved tag against known tags
  before applying PrimaryLanguageOverride; build SupportedLanguages with
  localized system-default display name after setting the override
- SettingsViewModel: use SupportedLanguages[0] fallback instead of
  removed LanguageOption.SystemDefault
- MainWindow: set Title via LocalizationService.GetString('AppTitle')
  in code-behind; add AppTitle resource to en-US and de-DE
- de-DE/Resources.resw: align ConfigTitle.Text to 'Konfiguration' to
  match NavConfig.Content

Co-authored-by: Copilot <223556219+Copilot@users.noreply.github.com>

* feat: enhance localization support by refining language management and UI language persistence

---------

Co-authored-by: Copilot <223556219+Copilot@users.noreply.github.com>

fix: flip playlist dropdown to open downward when near top of screen

Measures button's getBoundingClientRect().top on open; if < 200px from
top of viewport the menu uses top: calc(100% + 8px) instead of
bottom: calc(100% + 8px), preventing it from being hidden behind the
search bar on top search result rows.

Adds test covering the atpb-menu-down class is applied when button is
near top of screen.

Co-authored-by: Copilot <223556219+Copilot@users.noreply.github.com>

Co-authored-by: Copilot <223556219+Copilot@users.noreply.github.com>

Add detailed logging to token refresh endpoint to diagnose periodic reload

The FusionAuth React SDK's shouldAutoRefresh is triggering a re-login
redirect cycle whenever POST /app/refresh returns 401. Structured logs
will now capture:
- Whether a refresh token was issued at all after login (callback)
- The exact FusionAuth error body when the refresh token grant fails

This is a diagnostic step. The root fix is in FusionAuth application
settings:
1. Tokens tab: enable 'Generate Refresh Tokens'
2. JWT tab: set access token duration to ≥3600s (currently ~78s)

Co-authored-by: Copilot <223556219+Copilot@users.noreply.github.com>

fix(multiplayer): fix lobby presence and start game navigation (Epic 18)

Story 18.1: buildConnectedPresence() now constructs LobbyPresence entries
for players not in the initial snapshot instead of discarding them. Known
players still use DB snapshot values; unknown players use self-reported
Presence payload values and sort after known players. Add full unit test
suite for presence.ts.

Story 18.2: handleStartGame() calls router.push() directly after the
game_started broadcast so the host no longer depends on a self-broadcast
round-trip. startGame() in hostActions.ts now only revalidates /play,
removing the harmful lobby-path revalidation that raced against broadcast
navigation.

Co-authored-by: rangspottr <265638228+rangspottr@users.noreply.github.com>

fix(ci): resolve jq Infinity parse error — 5-point patch

Root cause: src/ had 50 files -> CALIBRATION_MILESTONE(=10) multiple
-> _check_calibration_hint() printed to stdout AFTER JSON output
-> jq parsed '{...json...}\n[*] Calibration milestone...' and failed

Fixes:
1. cli_commands.py: _check_calibration_hint() all print() -> file=sys.stderr
2. metrics/inflation.py: float('inf') -> 10.0 (max cap, RFC 8259 safe)
3. core.py: avg_inflation filter: status != 'error' -> math.isfinite()
4. cli.py: _sanitize_for_json() handles tuple; json.dumps(allow_nan=False)
5. tests/e2e_v321: milestone_fired/auto_calibrated check stdout+stderr

Co-authored-by: Copilot <223556219+Copilot@users.noreply.github.com>

commit.message:
Add montage order toggle for song lists (#34)

Adds a button to reorder songs by their montage sequence (alphabetical
by country, matching the ESC montage video) instead of the default
semi-final running order.

### Changes

- **`constants.ts`**: Added `sortSongsByMontageOrder(songs, year)` and
`hasMontageData(year)` helpers that sort songs by `ESC_MONTAGE_DATA`
timestamp order
- **`vote-song-list.tsx`**: Toggle button switches between "📋 Semi-final
order" / "🎬 Montage order"; hides semifinal group headers in montage
mode
- **`dashboard-controls.tsx`**: Same toggle; `handleSkip` now follows
the active display order
- **`vote.tsx`**: Passes `escYear` to `VoteSongList`

The toggle only renders when montage data exists for the game's ESC
year.

commit.message:
Archetype setup wizard handoff pattern

Core federation-setup rewritten from scratch (v0.2.0):
- Stripped all archetype-specific config (deliverable, schema, steps, roles)
- Core config reduced to 4 fields: description, branchPrefix, mcpStack, telemetry
- Uses 'team' language, not 'domain'
- No upfront team listing — teams onboard one at a time
- After archetype install, hands off to archetype's setup skill

New archetype setup skills:
- deliverable-setup: filename, schema, playbook steps, import hook
- coding-setup: PR target branch, playbook steps, code conventions, test requirements

Both write to .squad/archetype-config.json (team worktree), not core config.
Handoff: core setup → install archetype → archetype setup activates.

Co-authored-by: Vladi Lyga <lyvladi@gmail.com>
Co-authored-by: Copilot <223556219+Copilot@users.noreply.github.com>

style(ContextPrimitivesView): use default text color in summary block

Remove selectedBlock.fg color overrides from the detail panel so
text always renders in the default foreground color.

Co-authored-by: Copilot <223556219+Copilot@users.noreply.github.com>

fix: remove @media dark override that bled dark vars into light mode

The @media (prefers-color-scheme: dark) block in :root was overriding CSS
variables to dark values even when the user had manually selected light mode
via the toggle (localStorage = '0'). Because the html.dark class was absent,
element-level dark overrides did not apply — but the dark :root vars did.
Result: dark backgrounds/text in light mode for OS-dark-mode users.

Fix: remove the CSS media query block entirely. Theme is now controlled
exclusively by the JS class toggle (html.dark) which already reads OS
preference via matchMedia in initDarkMode(). No behaviour change for
first-time visitors; manual overrides are now respected correctly.

Bonus fix: toggleDarkMode() was replacing btn.textContent with emoji text,
wiping the Lucide <i> icon node. Extracted _darkBtnSync() helper that
updates only the <span> text and swaps the data-lucide attribute.

Co-authored-by: Copilot <223556219+Copilot@users.noreply.github.com>

Co-authored-by: copilot-swe-agent[bot] <198982749+Copilot@users.noreply.github.com>
Co-authored-by: ALTrijssenaar <6206388+ALTrijssenaar@users.noreply.github.com>

fix(firmware): propagate update status from /api/health every 5 s

Previously CanteraFirmwareUpdateEntity only polled /api/update once per
hour, so the sensor could show 'Not Checked' for up to an hour after
restart even when the Pi had a fresh check result.

Now _poll_health() (5-second interval) reads the new firmware_update_status
field from /api/health and calls set_firmware_update_state() immediately,
so the sensor updates within 5 seconds of the Pi's background check.

Also bumps MIN_API_VERSION_MINOR to 2 to match the Pi-side API_VERSION_MINOR
bump for this additive health field.

* Refactor Docker and CI/CD configurations, remove deprecated scripts, and enhance logging

- Updated GitHub Actions workflow to use new Dockerfile for amd64 architecture and set build metadata.
- Added new Dockerfile for building signed OpenTela binaries.
- Removed obsolete deployment scripts and configuration files for Clariden and Euler.
- Updated Dockerfile to streamline the build process and ensure proper entry points.
- Enhanced logging in the protocol to provide more detailed debug information.
- Adjusted public address handling to support DNS hostnames in the network configuration.

* baremetal docker serving docs

* feat(fleet_manager): add proxychains support + migrate cluster configs

Add ProxyChains dataclass to cluster.py with enabled/ssh_key/proxy_target/
socks_port/skip_partitions fields. When enabled and the preset partition is
not in skip_partitions, apptainer_single/multi templates open an SSH SOCKS
tunnel from inside the SLURM allocation and export HTTPS_PROXY/HTTP_PROXY/
ALL_PROXY so downstream commands (apptainer pull, HF hub, user code) have
internet access via the tunnel.

Populate contrib/fleet_manager/clusters/ with jsc, jsc-dev, euler, clariden
migrated to the preset-based schema. JSC enables proxychains by default with
develbooster and dc-gpu-devel listed in skip_partitions.

Update README to document presets, user-command env vars ($SERVICE_PORT,
$HF_HOME), multi-node conventions, and proxychains. Delete stale docs/
files that described the old model-centric layout.

52/52 tests pass.

* update deploy playbook

commit.message:
Fix TE prompt issues: selector hallucination, duplicate files, assertion mismatch, timeouts

- Replace Blazor-specific selector blacklist with general 'only use selectors from source files'
- Update per-locator timeout from 30000ms to 60000ms across all prompt locations
- Add 'DO NOT CREATE DUPLICATE FILES' rule to system prompts and build-fix loops
- Add 'ASSERTIONS MUST MATCH SOURCE CODE, not spec documents' rule
- Fix design reference prompt to clarify it's informational only
- Make build-fix loop prompts tech-stack-agnostic (dependency manifest vs .csproj)

Co-authored-by: Copilot <223556219+Copilot@users.noreply.github.com>

feat: redirect unauthenticated users to login on import attempt

When a user is not logged in and clicks the import button:
- Their URL/text and tab selection are saved to sessionStorage
- They are redirected to login (postLoginRedirect set to '/')
- On return, the pending import is restored and auto-submitted

Button label changes from 'Scan URL'/'Import Recipe' to 'Sign in to Import'
with a LogIn icon when the user is not authenticated, making the auth
requirement clear before they even click.

commit.message:
Merge pull request #25 from dchu3/fix/alert-flood-protection

fix: reset rate-limit on resume, fix cursor skip on per-poll cap

- Add WhaleTracker.resetAlertCount() to clear in-memory counter
- Call resetAlertCount from /resume in CLI and Telegram so resumed
  wallets aren't immediately re-paused
- Track last processed index in pollWallet loop; roll back cursor
  when MAX_ALERTS_PER_POLL breaks early so skipped txs are retried

repository.name: spore
repository.description: Spore (孢子) — A general-purpose programming language optimized for Agent-human intent interaction

commit.message:
Add Oscan ports of laststanding examples: sh and led

sh.osc: Simple interactive shell with builtins (cd, pwd, exit, echo,
export, env) and external command execution via proc_run.

led.osc: Terminal-based text editor with cursor navigation, insert/
delete, line splitting, scrolling, save (Ctrl-S), quit (Ctrl-Q),
and goto-line (Ctrl-G).

Co-authored-by: Copilot <223556219+Copilot@users.noreply.github.com>

feat: add robot AI system — Arduino bridge, camera, navigation, tracking, collision avoidance, phone pairing, dashboard

- Arduino dual-mode firmware (line-follow + command mode)
- Brain Pi daemon: FSM, vision nav, YOLOv8 tracking, collision guard
- Face Pi camera script with LAN + Vercel streaming
- Vercel APIs: camera-feed, robot-state, robot-command, phone-link, ask (Gemma 4)
- React dashboard with camera feed, state bar, controls, QR phone pairing
- Phone companion page (/link) with heartbeat beacon
- Vision-based collision avoidance (CLEAR/CAUTION/DANGER zones)
- BLE proximity scanner (optional AirTag-like tracking)
- systemd service files for Pi boot automation

commit.message:
fix(ClosingQuoteView): use canonical URL for social share links

LinkedIn and Facebook only support passing a URL to their share dialogs
(text pre-fill is not supported). Both platforms pull title, description,
and image from the page's OG tags.

Replace window.location.href with the hardcoded canonical URL so shares
always point to the production page and OG tags are reliably scraped.

Co-authored-by: Copilot <223556219+Copilot@users.noreply.github.com>

Replace invisible tap zone with visible toggle button

Small floating button in top-right corner  shows fire emoji
when on FlightView, plane emoji when on Kiln. Single tap to toggle.
Much more reliable than invisible double-tap zones on 7in screen.

Co-authored-by: Copilot <223556219+Copilot@users.noreply.github.com>
